title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Small Luxury Hotels of the World (London) Ltd
body: "Application number 5194  Applicant Small Luxury Hotels of the World Limited objected to the name used by Small Luxury Hotels of the World (London) Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 7 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Small Luxury Hotels of the World (London) Ltd is changed to 11413313, LTD. "
